questionHtml:
Which of these ions are likely to be paramagnetic?

I.   Ti3+
II.  Cr3+
III. Fe3+


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which of these ions are likely to be paramagnetic? I. Ti3+II. Cr3+III. Fe3+ A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
